title: LATAM Critical Infrastructure Operator Record
description: Unified record format for an OIV-equivalent operator across LATAM jurisdictions. All per-country datasets under data/countries/{cc}/known-domains.json MUST validate against this schema.

identifier.description: Normalized national identifier in canonical form for the country.

identifierType.description: Identifier scheme used for the value above.

razonSocial.description: Legal name of the operator as published by the national regulator.

domain.description: Primary web domain of the operator, or null if unresolved.

sectorLocal.description: Country-specific sector label as used by the national regulator.

sourceUrl.description: Public URL where the source publication is hosted.

sourceDate.description: Date of the regulator publication used for this record (YYYY-MM-DD).

verified.description: DNS-verifiable status of the domain at submission time. null if not checked.

confidence.description: Confidence band 0–1. 1.0 indicates a canonical registry match.
